The 2022/23 elimination at the hands of Bayern makes it now 15 times in the competition without winning. Editions Have PSG ever won the Champions League? History, all-time tournament record for Ligue 1 giants Jeorge Bird • • Paris Saint-Germain, led by their star attacking triumvirate of Lionel Messi, Kylian Mbappe and Neymar, have come up short in the Champions League for a second straight season. One year after succumbing in the 2021/22 Round of 16 against Real Madrid, coughing up a 2-0 aggregate-goal lead to a Karim Benzema hat-trick, PSG fell to another storied side at the first knockout stage hurdle. The 2022/23 Round of 16 saw them matched up against Bayern Munich and the German side were their clinical selves, notching two shutout victories en route to a 3-0 aggregate-goal blanking. What makes it worse is that two of Bayern's three goals were scored by former PSG players. PSG may be on course to add an 11th Ligue 1 crown in 2023, but the Champions League has been their ultimate goal in recent seasons. Yet they've come up short again. Bayern Munich 2-0 Paris Saint-Germain: Only Arsenal (177 excl. qualifiers) have played more UEFA Champions League games than Paris Saint-Germain (137) without ever winning the trophy. PSG can now add some more games to that next season. pic.twitter.com/M61gFleXL4 How close have PSG come to winning the Champions League? The closest PSG have come to winning the Champions League was in the 2019/20 campaign, when they reached the final, where they were beaten 1-0 by Bayern Munich in Lisbon, with Kingsley Coman (an ex-PSG player) scoring the game-winner in the 59th minute. That season PSG topped a group including Real Madrid, Club Brugge and Galatasaray. They then beat Borussia Dortmund, Atalanta and RB Leipzig in the knockout stages en route to the final.

European Cup) overall? In this feature, we look at their overall record and their best performances. Have PSG Ever Won the Champions League? PSG have never, in fact, won the UCL, in their relatively short history. That makes Paris perhaps the largest city in Europe without a win in the competition and PSG and everyone connected with the club are desperate to change that. They won the European Cup Winners’ Cup back in 1995/96 and also the minor Intertoto Cup in 2001 but major UEFA silverware has eluded them. They were only founded in 1970 but even so, that is more than 50 years without reaching the summit of European football. They have competed in the European Cup once and the Champions League 16 times including 2023/24. They have played in the competition every season since 2012/13 but, ahead of the semis of the 2023/24 campaign, are yet to claim glory. PSG’s Best Season in the Champions League The French side made the semis at their first attempt in the Champions League, in 1994/95, having gone out in the first round of the European Cup in 1986/87. However, since then they have very much flattered to deceive and under the current ownership have almost always gone out at the quarter final stage or even earlier, at the Round of 16. However, in 2019/20, when they completed a clean sweep of the domestic honours, they achieved their best finish ever in the competition. They romped to the Ligue 1 title in a season cut short due to the global health crisis of the time, and also landed the Coupe de France, Coupe de Ligue and the French super cup, the Trophee des Champions. They had such a strong squad at the time, with the likes of Keylor Navas in goal, Thiago Silva as skipper, plus attacking talents including Kylian Mbappe, Angel Di Maria, Mauro Icardi, Edinson Cavani and Julian Draxler. baseline.final_answer: Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) has never won the Champions League. Their closest attempt was in the 2019/20 season when they reached the final but lost to Bayern Munich.

evaluation.feedback: The answer is correct but lacks citations. The provided documents state that PSG has never won the Champions League and that their closest attempt was in the 2019/20 season.
